name: DOGE Session Drive Continuation v1
thesis: DOGE 4h can sustain directional follow-through when an impulse window establishes structure and the next bar holds rather than fully mean reverting. The edge should come from session-drive continuation with broad structural hold, not fragile single-bar breakout grammar.
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

long: Time-based de-risk after 3 bars if unrealized gain < 0.35 * ATR_14
short: Time-based de-risk after 3 bars if unrealized gain < 0.35 * ATR_14
